core.label: Scala Fundamentals
core.description: Syntax, types, val/var, and basic constructs.

topics.label: Setup & sbt
topics.description: Install Scala with Coursier and build projects with sbt. sbt is Scala's primary build tool.

topics.label: Val, Var & Type Inference
topics.description: Immutable val, mutable var, and powerful type inference. Scala encourages immutability.

topics.label: Basic Types & Expressions
topics.description: Int, Double, String, Boolean, Unit. Everything is an expression in Scala — if/match return values.

topics.label: Functions & Methods
topics.description: def methods, anonymous functions, and higher-order functions. Functions are first-class values.

topics.label: Control Structures
topics.description: if/else (as expressions), while, for comprehensions. for comprehensions are Scala's swiss-army knife.

topics.label: String Interpolation
topics.description: s"", f"", and raw"" string interpolators. Embed expressions directly in strings.

topics.label: Collections (List, Vector, Map, Set)
topics.description: Immutable collections by default with rich functional APIs. Scala's collection library is world-class.

topics.label: Tuples
topics.description: Group values of different types. Tuples are useful for multiple returns and pattern matching.

topics.label: Pattern Matching
topics.description: match/case for powerful decomposition. Pattern matching is Scala's most distinctive feature.

core.label: OOP & Traits
core.description: Classes, objects, traits, and Scala's type hierarchy.

topics.label: Classes & Objects
topics.description: Define classes with constructors and companion objects (Scala's static equivalent).

topics.label: Case Classes
topics.description: Immutable data classes with auto-generated equals, hashCode, toString, copy, and unapply.

topics.label: Traits
topics.description: Composable units of behavior — like interfaces with implementations. Mix multiple traits into a class.

topics.label: Sealed Traits & ADTs
topics.description: Restrict trait extensions for exhaustive pattern matching. The foundation of algebraic data types.

topics.label: Enums (Scala 3)
topics.description: First-class enums with parameters and methods. Scala 3 enums replace sealed trait + case object patterns.

topics.label: Inheritance & Mixins
topics.description: extends for inheritance, with for mixing in traits. Linearization determines method resolution.

topics.label: Abstract Classes
topics.description: Classes with unimplemented members. Use abstract classes when you need constructor parameters.

topics.label: Generics & Variance
topics.description: Type parameters with covariance (+T), contravariance (-T), and bounds.

core.label: Functional Programming
core.description: Higher-order functions, Option, Either, and functional patterns.

topics.label: Higher-Order Functions
topics.description: Pass and return functions. map, flatMap, filter, fold, reduce on collections.

topics.label: Option[T]
topics.description: Represent optional values with Some(value) or None. Eliminates null pointer exceptions.

topics.label: Either[L, R]
topics.description: Represent success (Right) or failure (Left). Either is Scala's functional error handling.

topics.label: Try[T]
topics.description: Wrap exceptions in Success or Failure. Try bridges exception-based and functional error handling.

topics.label: For Comprehensions
topics.description: Syntactic sugar for chaining flatMap/map/filter. Clean composition of monadic operations.

topics.label: Partial Functions
topics.description: Functions defined for a subset of inputs with case syntax. Used in collect and error handlers.

topics.label: Currying & Partial Application
topics.description: Multiple parameter lists and partially applied functions. Enables DSLs and type inference.

topics.label: Implicits / Given (Scala 3)
topics.description: Implicit conversions, parameters, and Scala 3's given/using. Powers type classes and dependency injection.

core.label: Concurrency & Testing
core.description: Futures, Akka basics, testing, and build tools.

topics.label: Futures
topics.description: Asynchronous computation with Future and ExecutionContext. Compose with map, flatMap, recover.

topics.label: Promise
topics.description: Complete Futures manually with Promise. Bridge callback APIs to Future-based code.

topics.label: ScalaTest
topics.description: The most popular Scala testing framework with multiple styles (FunSuite, FlatSpec, WordSpec).

topics.label: Mocking (ScalaMock)
topics.description: Mock traits and classes for isolated unit tests.

topics.label: sbt Deep Dive
topics.description: Multi-project builds, plugins, publishing. sbt's configuration is Scala code.

topics.label: Java Interop
topics.description: Call Java from Scala and vice versa. Scala compiles to JVM bytecode with full interop.

topics.label: Error Handling Patterns
topics.description: Choose between exceptions, Option, Either, and Try based on context. Functional error handling best practices.

topics.label: Type Classes
topics.description: Ad-hoc polymorphism with traits and implicits/given. The FP pattern for extensible behavior.
